analysis.primary_subject: Interior space featuring handcrafted wicker and rattan decor elements, including ceiling installations and hanging lampshades

craftsmanship_quality.precision: High - The weaving and knotting are meticulously done, showing consistent patterns and tight joins.
craftsmanship_quality.surface_quality: High - The surfaces of the wicker and rattan elements are smooth and well-finished, with no visible rough edges.
craftsmanship_quality.attention_to_detail: High - The intricate designs of the hanging lampshades and ceiling installations demonstrate a high level of craftsmanship and attention to detail.

portfolio_presentation.accompanying_text: This image showcases a beautifully crafted interior space featuring hand-woven wicker and rattan decor. The intricate ceiling installations and hanging lampshades add a rustic charm, creating a cozy and inviting atmosphere. The use of natural materials and earthy tones highlights the craftsmanship and attention to detail.
